markets.rules_primary: If the temperature recorded at Central Park, New York City for Jun 24, 2026 4 PM EDT as reported by The Weather Company (for coordinates KNYC), is above 91.99°, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The official, final value for this market is the temperature reported by the The Weather Company, not any other weather service.
NWS Climatological Reports, Google Weather, etc. may be useful references, but are not authoritative for resolution.
Preliminary Weather Company data may be subject to rounding and conversion differences from the final reported value.
Use caution when interpreting preliminary Weather Company readings.
markets.subtitle: -1° or below

markets.rules_primary: If the close price of the 1-minute candlestick for silver on June 24, 2026 at 5:00 PM EDT is above 56.75 USD/t.oz, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The settlement value is rounded to the nearest 2 decimal places. When confirming the settlement value, note the close price for the 1-minute candlestick at a given time is the price at the end of the immediately preceding one-minute interval. For example, the candlestick timestamped 4:59 PM reflects trading during 4:59:00 PM to 4:59:59 PM and closes at 5:00:00 PM. If no data is published by the specified source agency for the specified time, then the most recently available published data will be used to resolve the market.
markets.title: Will the silver close price be above 56.75 USD/t.oz on June 24, 2026 at 5:00 PM EDT?

If no data is published by the specified source agency for the specified time, then the most recently available published data will be used to resolve the market.
markets.title: Will the silver close price be above 54.50 USD/t.oz on June 24, 2026 at 5:00 PM EDT?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Sultan Al-Brake records at least 1 assist during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Bosnia and Herzegovina vs Qatar professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 24, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Bosnia and Herzegovina vs Qatar professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 24, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's assists recorded.
markets.title: Sultan Al-Brake: 1+ assists?
